results.name: API Error Handler
results.testResponse: Returns PNG image (logo generator), HTTP 200 but not a data API. Listed as 'error handler' but actually generates glitch-style logo images.

results.name: API Tools
results.testResponse: DNS resolution failed - host 'api.apitools.workers.dev' cannot be resolved. API is down.

results.name: Aare.guru API
results.testResponse: 404 Not Found on all tested endpoints. Docs URL returns HTML only, not a REST API.

results.name: Abhi API
results.testResponse: Has multiple working endpoints: /api/game/dare (returns truth/dare prompts), /api/logo/glitch, /api/logo/neon (return PNG logos). Some endpoints return 500 errors (e.g., /api/fun/fact). Best for: dare/game prompts.

results.name: Air Quality API
results.testResponse: Open-Meteo Air Quality API. Returns current AQI, pollutant levels, pollen data at 11km resolution. Fully functional.

results.name: AmiiboAPI
results.testResponse: Connection refused / timeout. Host resolves but no data returned. API appears to be down or blocking requests.

results.name: AnApiOfIceAndFire
results.testResponse: Game of Thrones API - returns detailed book/character/house data. Fully functional REST API, no auth required.

results.name: ArgentinaDatos API
results.testResponse: Root returns {"estado":"Correcto"} - just a health check, not actual data. Actual data endpoints (exchange-rates, indicators) return 404. Very limited actual API.

results.name: BIZ FACTORY
results.testResponse: Not an API - just a Telegram group link. Listed incorrectly as an API.

results.name: BMI Calculator API
results.testResponse: All endpoints return 404. The docs URL redirects to /api/ which returns HTML. No functional endpoints found.

results.name: Bank Logos API
results.testResponse: Redirects to /api-docs HTML page. All tested API endpoints (/api/v1/logo, /api/v1/search, etc.) return 404. Not a functional API.

results.name: Beverage Mixing API
results.testResponse: Returns truth/dare style prompts for games. Functional, returns JSON with dare text. Part of Abhi API suite.

results.name: Cat Fact API
results.testResponse: Cat Facts API - returns random cat facts. Fully functional, CORS enabled. Rate limit: 100/hour.

results.name: CelesTrak GP Data
results.testResponse: Satellite orbital data (TLE). Returns JSON with ISS and other satellite orbital parameters. Fully functional. No auth.

results.name: Church Calendar API
results.testResponse: All tested endpoints return 404. The server responds but has no data at any path.

results.name: Company Search API
results.testResponse: French company registry search. Returns SIREN numbers, company names, addresses, etc. Fully functional, CORS enabled.

results.name: Digimon API
results.testResponse: Digimon database API - returns digimon name, image, href. Fully functional, CORS enabled.

results.name: Dragon Ball API
results.testResponse: Dragon Ball character data. Returns character name, ki, maxKi, race, gender, description. Fully functional (note: descriptions in Spanish). CORS credentials enabled.

results.name: Dutch Customer Data API
results.testResponse: All tested endpoints return empty or redirect. No usable data returned. Likely requires registration.

results.name: Dymo API Introduction
results.testResponse: Not an API - redirects to a shortener/landing page. No actual API endpoints.

results.name: EVA Email Verification
results.testResponse: Connection fails / empty response on all tested endpoints. Host appears to block requests.

results.name: ElonMuskAPI
results.testResponse: Returns random news articles featuring Elon Musk from various sources (Gizmodo, etc.). Fully functional, returns JSON with source, title, description.

results.name: Error Handling API
results.testResponse: Returns PNG neon-style logo image, HTTP 200. Not actually an error-handling API - it's a logo image generator like the other abhi-api endpoints.

results.name: Exchange Rates API
results.testResponse: Both exchangeratesapi.io and exchangeratesapi.com.au require API keys. Free tier no longer available.

results.name: Footer Year Update
results.testResponse: Returns current year as JSON: {year: 2026, sponsored_by: '...'}. Functional but comedic (has elaborate incident reports about year-update failures). No auth.

results.name: Free Dictionary API
results.testResponse: Full dictionary entries with word, phonetics, definitions, examples, synonyms. No auth, CORS enabled. Excellent quality data.

results.name: Free Music API
results.testResponse: TheAudioDB music metadata API - artist details, albums, tracks, charts. Fully functional, CORS enabled. Free tier available.

results.name: Fuel Prices at Spanish Gas Stations
results.testResponse: Docs URL is datos.gob.es data portal, not a direct API. No working JSON endpoints found at the listed URL.

results.name: Genderize.io
results.testResponse: Predicts gender from first name with probability score. Fully functional, CORS enabled, returns count/probability. Free, no auth for basic use.

results.name: Global Flood API
results.testResponse: Open-Meteo flood API returns data errors: 'Data corrupted at path'. The API appears to have issues with its data backend. Not reliably usable.

readyToWire: Cat Fact API - catfact.ninja/fact - simplest, most reliable
Free Dictionary API - api.dictionaryapi.dev - rich language data, CORS enabled
Genderize.io - api.genderize.io - name→gender prediction, CORS enabled
Digimon API - digi-api.com - gaming data, CORS enabled
Company Search API - recherche-entreprises.api.gouv.fr - French business data, CORS enabled
Free Music API (TheAudioDB) - theaudiodb.com - music metadata, CORS enabled
Dragon Ball API - dragonball-api.com - entertainment, CORS credentials
AnApiOfIceAndFire - anapioficeandfire.com - GoT data, no auth
Abhi API /api/game/dare - beverage mixing / dare prompts
issuesFound: 8 of 30 APIs are completely dead (404, connection refused, DNS failure)
2 are not APIs at all (biz-factory=Telegram group, dymo=intro page)
Many 'high-health' APIs are mis-categorized or have misleading docs URLs
Several abhi-api endpoints return PNG images, not data (logo generators)
dragon-ball-api descriptions are in Spanish, not English
argentinadatos-api only returns health check, no real data
